default_judge_prompt: Did this stage complete successfully? Look for clear evidence in the CLI output that the required work was done. Check for: 1) No obvious errors or failures, 2) The work aligns with the original goal. Respond with YES or NO followed by a brief explanation.

defaults._maxBudgetNote: Set maxBudgetUsd to enable automatic context handoff when budget is exhausted. Pricing basis (as of 2025): Sonnet ~$0.60/context window, Opus ~$3.60/context window. Recommended: 2-5x a single context window cost. Set to 0 to disable.

full.description: Complete workflow: research → plan → implement → validate → commit

quick.description: Quick workflow when plan isn't needed

research.judge_prompt: Did the research stage produce useful findings? Check the CLI output for: 1) A research document was written to thoughts/shared/research/, 2) It contains relevant code locations and patterns, 3) It identifies key files related to the goal.

debug.judge_prompt: Did the debug stage identify the issue? Check the CLI output for: 1) Root cause analysis was performed, 2) A fix or next steps were proposed.

plan.judge_prompt: Is the plan complete and actionable? Check the CLI output for: 1) A plan was written to thoughts/shared/plans/, 2) It has clear phases with specific changes, 3) It includes success criteria, 4) No open questions remain.

implement.judge_prompt: Did implementation make progress? Check the CLI output for: 1) Code changes were made, 2) No critical errors occurred during implementation.

validate.judge_prompt: Did validation pass? Check the CLI output for: 1) Tests were run, 2) Linting/type checking results, 3) Any failures documented with next steps.

commit.judge_prompt: Was the commit/PR created? Check the CLI output for: 1) Changes were committed, 2) A PR was created if requested.

fetch-feedback.judge_prompt: Did the fetch-feedback stage gather PR feedback? Check for: 1) PR comments were fetched, 2) A goal.md was written with clear action items from the feedback.

merge-conflict.judge_prompt: Did the merge conflict resolution complete? Check the CLI output for: 1) Conflicts were detected and listed, 2) Resolutions were applied, 3) The merge/rebase was completed or the branch was clean.
